# Pull Request

## Agent Information

**Agent ID:** [e.g., agent-a, agent-b, human]  
**Work Branch:** [e.g., agent-a/feature/add-diff-tool]

## Description

<!-- Provide a clear description of what this PR does -->

## Changes Made

- [ ] Added new feature
- [ ] Fixed bug
- [ ] Updated documentation
- [ ] Refactored code
- [ ] Added tests

### New Files

### Modified Files

### Deleted Files

## Testing

- [ ] All tests pass locally (`npm test`)
- [ ] Coverage >= 80% (`npm test -- --coverage`)
- [ ] Build succeeds (`npm run build`)
- [ ] No TypeScript errors (`npx tsc --noEmit`)
- [ ] Tested manually in MCP client
- [ ] Tests are isolated and don't depend on each other

## Commits

- [ ] All commits follow conventional commit format
- [ ] Commits are small and focused (one logical change per commit)
- [ ] No large monolithic commits
- [ ] Average: [X] commits (should be 5-15 for features)

## Documentation

- [ ] README.md updated (if needed)
- [ ] JSDoc comments added to new functions
- [ ] Usage examples provided
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated (if applicable)

## Dependencies

- [ ] No new dependencies added
- [ ] New dependencies added and justified
- [ ] All dependencies are necessary and well-maintained

## Conflicts

- [ ] No merge conflicts
- [ ] Rebased onto latest main
- [ ] Resolved conflicts (if any) and tested

## Coordination (For Parallel Work)

- [ ] Communicated with other agents about this work
- [ ] No overlapping work with other agents
- [ ] Released any file locks used during development
- [ ] Checked `.file-locks` before modifying shared files

## Security

- [ ] No secrets or API keys committed
- [ ] All user inputs are validated
- [ ] File paths are sanitized
- [ ] No security vulnerabilities introduced

## Checklist

- [ ] Code compiles without errors
- [ ] All tests pass
- [ ] Coverage requirements met
- [ ] Documentation updated
- [ ] Conventional commits used
- [ ] Branch is up to date with main
- [ ] No debugging code left in (console.log, commented code, etc.)
- [ ] Followed all project guardrails

## Breaking Changes

<!-- If this PR introduces breaking changes, describe them here -->

- [ ] No breaking changes
- [ ] Breaking changes documented and versioned appropriately

## Additional Notes

<!-- Any additional information reviewers should know -->

**Before merging:**
- [ ] All CI checks pass

- [ ] No other PRs are being merged simultaneously
- [ ] Ready to merge
